klayer Test Document

This HTML page tests klayer's existing HTML ingest pipeline.

Clean Code Rules

  • Meaningful names: a name should reveal intent without a comment.
  • Single Responsibility: one function, one job.
  • DRY: every piece of knowledge has one authoritative source.

Trust Model

Ingested content starts as untrusted. The model proposes candidate rules. A human promotes them to reviewed. Only reviewed and user knowledge is enforced.
